purpose: PRECRIME classification policy. Promotion is procedural hot-eligibility gates (server/mcp/classification.js) plus an LLM product-market-fit judge (mcp_server.js judgeLeed, prompt in DOCS/PROMPTS.json). No numeric score, no gates. See DOCS/CLASSIFICATION.md.

classification._comment: Procedural hot-eligibility knobs read by classification.js. requiredFields is the addLeed contract a marketplace share must be able to compose; the addLeed API itself is the final judge of location precision and acceptance.

demandSignal._comment: hotDaysOut bounds the hot-leedz window for soonest-event ordering.

statusRules.cold: Start and end state: just created, dossier has 0 factlets, acted upon (outreach drafted or leed shared), or the event date has passed. Recyclable.
statusRules.brewing: Under enrichment, or a hot prerequisite is still missing (no real direct contact, or no located + dated + timed booking). No LLM is spent here.
statusRules.hot: All procedural prerequisites met AND the LLM judged genuine product-market fit. Actionable now: share (marketplace) or outreach email.
